name: Seller Assistant
description: Seller assistant tools for pricing, RFQ replies, inventory checks, and campaign planning.

defaultCurrency.description: Default currency code used for formatted tool output.

defaultLocale.description: Default locale used for formatted tool output.

targetMarginFloorPct.description: Default minimum gross margin percentage used by quote and campaign guidance.

lowInventoryDays.description: Inventory days-of-cover threshold that triggers low-stock warnings.

defaultSupplierLeadDays.description: Default supplier lead time in days used by restock checks when the user does not provide one.

defaultSafetyStockDays.description: Default safety stock buffer in days used by restock checks when the user does not provide one.

defaultSalesLookbackDays.description: Default lookback window in days used to estimate average daily sales for Shopify-backed restock checks.

defaultResponseTone.description: Default response tone for seller-facing draft outputs.

defaultStoreId.description: Default store profile to use when the user does not specify a store.

stores.description: Configured seller stores grouped by platform.

id.description: Local identifier for this Shopify store profile.

name.description: Display name for this Shopify store profile.

storeDomain.description: The merchant-owned *.myshopify.com store domain where the merchant's own Shopify app is installed.

clientId.description: Client id of the merchant-owned Shopify app used for this store. This plugin does not provide a shared public Shopify app.

clientSecretEnv.description: Environment variable name on the OpenClaw host that contains the merchant-owned Shopify app client secret.
